meta.educational_goal: To explain and demonstrate the Breadth-First Search algorithm.

states.label: Idle
evidence: <button id="run-demo" class="btn-demo" aria-label="Run BFS demonstration">Run BFS Demo</button>

states.label: Running BFS
evidence: btn.addEventListener('click', () => { const order = bfs(graph, 'A'); output.textContent = 'BFS Visit Order starting at node A:\n' + order.join(' → '); });
